fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 71 incorrectly identifies cases where an element should be removed. The subsequent `pop()` on line 72 causes the final list to be too short when both input lists end with the same value.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition for removing an element should never be met, as all elements from both inputs must be preserved.
After the main merge logic and appending remainders, the merged list must contain the total number of elements from both inputs.
The final returned list must contain all elements from both input lists.
